title: Slack Integrate Plus separate cost to Monday.com?

posts.author: KirstenLeighton (Kirsten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

Just a question here if we purchase monday.com work management features when integrating with Slack Integrate Plus is that an additional cost to monday.com or part of the monday.com full fee for our team.

Thanks in advance

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kirsten!

Whilst we support the native Slack integration, we don’t currently support Slack IntegratePlus - this is an app available via our apps marketplace.

Screen Shot 2024-03-07 at 11.08.20 am1184×642 33.9 KB

I hope this helps!

posts.author: KirstenLeighton (Kirsten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bianca Taylor:

upport the native Slack integration, we don’t currently support Slack IntegratePlus - this is an app available via our apps marketplace.

Hi Bianca, thanks for getting back to me so does this mean its an extra seprate cost separate to monday.com?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, if you plan to use the Slack IntegratePlus app, that will be an extra separate cost.

posts.author: KirstenLeighton (Kirsten)
posts.cookedHtml:
alfred:

u plan to use the Slack IntegratePlus app, that will be an extra separate cost.

Thanks Alfred really appreciate it

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @KirstenLeighton

Being a recognized monday.com integrations services provider, we would recommend you use the intuitive Slack integration. When you plan to connect the Slack IntegratePlus app with monday.com, it will yield an extra separate cost. Whereas, by using built-in integration, you can connect multiple Slack accounts and simplify communication.

Our integration consultants would love to set up your monday.com Slack integration and synchronize communication. To hire our consultants, visit here!
